Record Class RenderDebugTrace.Snapshot

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.soulfiremc.server.renderer.RenderDebugTrace.Snapshot
Enclosing class:
RenderDebugTrace
public static record RenderDebugTrace.Snapshot(long renderId, long chunksConsidered, long chunksLoaded, long sectionsVisible, long sectionsMeshed, long sectionCacheHits, long sectionCacheMisses, long blockQuads, long entitiesConsidered, long entitiesVisible, long billboards, long weatherBillboards, long vanillaBlockGeometryHits, long vanillaBlockGeometryFallbacks, long opaqueTriangles, long cutoutTriangles, long translucentTriangles, long textSubmissions, ArrayList<RenderDebugTrace.TextSubmission> textSamples, ArrayList<String> notableEvents, ArrayList<String> detailedFailures) extends Record

  • Constructor Details

    • Snapshot

      public Snapshot(long renderId, long chunksConsidered, long chunksLoaded, long sectionsVisible, long sectionsMeshed, long sectionCacheHits, long sectionCacheMisses, long blockQuads, long entitiesConsidered, long entitiesVisible, long billboards, long weatherBillboards, long vanillaBlockGeometryHits, long vanillaBlockGeometryFallbacks, long opaqueTriangles, long cutoutTriangles, long translucentTriangles, long textSubmissions, ArrayList<RenderDebugTrace.TextSubmission> textSamples, ArrayList<String> notableEvents, ArrayList<String> detailedFailures)
      Creates an instance of a Snapshot record class.
      Parameters:
      renderId - the value for the renderId record component
      chunksConsidered - the value for the chunksConsidered record component
      chunksLoaded - the value for the chunksLoaded record component
      sectionsVisible - the value for the sectionsVisible record component
      sectionsMeshed - the value for the sectionsMeshed record component
      sectionCacheHits - the value for the sectionCacheHits record component
      sectionCacheMisses - the value for the sectionCacheMisses record component
      blockQuads - the value for the blockQuads record component
      entitiesConsidered - the value for the entitiesConsidered record component
      entitiesVisible - the value for the entitiesVisible record component
      billboards - the value for the billboards record component
      weatherBillboards - the value for the weatherBillboards record component
      vanillaBlockGeometryHits - the value for the vanillaBlockGeometryHits record component
      vanillaBlockGeometryFallbacks - the value for the vanillaBlockGeometryFallbacks record component
      opaqueTriangles - the value for the opaqueTriangles record component
      cutoutTriangles - the value for the cutoutTriangles record component
      translucentTriangles - the value for the translucentTriangles record component
      textSubmissions - the value for the textSubmissions record component
      textSamples - the value for the textSamples record component
      notableEvents - the value for the notableEvents record component
      detailedFailures - the value for the detailedFailures record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
